title: Evangelion videos on the web non canon
display_title: Evangelion videos on the web non canon
wikitext:
[]: Evangelion videos on the web [non-canon]             Quote Post by Archaea » Sun Jun 20, 2010 1:09 am If you have ever seen any cool fan based, non-series Neon Genesis Evangelion videos on the web, add a brief description of the video share the link here! http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=b-vvymqD3I4&feature=related A street dance group dancing to Cruel Angel's Thesis. Its like Japanese Jaberwakis with sunglasses and suits. http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=wshOecPxgm0&feature=related Here something you'd only see in Japan- NGE Orchestrated theme music played by a middle school band.

[]:             Quote Post by Clover » Mon Jun 21, 2010 7:55 pm Topic is really narrow, but I have some videos I can share. [url]http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=NpcPifsYLLU&feature=related[/url] *DING* EBANGERION. News show talking about EoE, or something. [url]http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=vUYxiKs2Ozw[/url] Eminence Orchestra playing Thanatos. [url]http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=l56nCdZZsc4[/url] Soul's Refrain "music video". Guy at 2 min sounds like Fuyutsuki. Japanese people in a room talking about Evangelion. Useless without a translation, but the VCR effects hint at the old-schoolness.
